text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo, member of the "Golden Generation"
and daughter of a legendary racer, is an
Umamusume who commands attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has an undying determination to win, but
comes off quite arrogant when dealing with
others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vain as she may be, I've chosen to join her in
facing the Twinkle Series. Our journey in racing
has begun.
